query:
SELECT dl.*, u.name, u.username 
FROM deliveryLocations dl
LEFT JOIN users u ON dl.deliveryPersonId = u.id
WHERE u.username = 'harth'
ORDER BY dl.timestamp DESC
LIMIT 5;
